text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Phew... It's scary... just how good I am!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What, ya wanna know more? Fine, since<n>you're
practically beggin', I'll tell ya!<n>You see...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: There were three sales going on at thesame time. And I perfectly cruisedthrough all three, buying up aaall thesale items on offer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You shoulda seen it. I was White<n>Lightning,
weavin' between people on<n>the crowded street!
